title: melicope haupuensis
intro: Melicope haupuensis, also known as the Haupu melicope, is a plant species endemic to Hawaii, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Melicope haupuensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight against infections, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melicope haupuensis typically involve making a tea from its leaves or using it in topical applications, such as creams or salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
